artifacts.name: Frontend Review Verdict
artifacts.description: Human-readable review of PR #54: FR-SCENE-001 implementation

summary.work_completed: Reviewed PR #54 (feature/8-scene-3d-rendering) for FR-SCENE-001. Verified all 5 implementation files: Scene3D.tsx, GridPlane.tsx, InstancedBricks.tsx, main.tsx, Scene3D.test.tsx. All 3 test IDs (T-FE-SCENE-001-01, T-FE-SCENE-001-02, T-FE-SCENE-001-03) implemented and spec-aligned. Verdict: APPROVED.
key_findings: OrbitControls mouseButtons={{ LEFT: undefined as unknown as number }} correctly frees LEFT for brick placement
GridPlane uses ThreeEvent (not DOM PointerEvent) via R3F mesh onPointerDown
window.__legoBuilderErrors initialized and console.error intercepted in main.tsx for KR-1.3
InstancedBricks uses InstancedMesh per type with MAX_INSTANCES=1000 (NFR-SCALE-001)
geometry.dispose() on unmount prevents WebGL memory leaks
All 3 test IDs implemented with correct beforeEach isolation and 3000ms waitFor timeout
Non-blocking: instancedMesh args with undefined material is correct R3F pattern
Non-blocking: __r3f internal API in tests is acceptable with dual-path fallback
Non-blocking: 0 CI check runs found on PR #54 — human gate should verify CI

human_review_required.item: Verify CI check runs pass on PR #54 before merging
human_review_required.reason: 0 CI check runs found — CI may not be configured or checks haven't triggered

recommended_actions: Human to approve and merge PR #54 at gate-6b-feature-pr
